compliance.title: Quality & compliance
compliance.description: All InterMax projects meet international quality standards and industry-specific certifications. We work in accordance with ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and with ISCIR, MLPDA, and MADR authorizations where applicable.

hero.title: High-performance technical construction
hero.subtitle: Integrated systems for facades, partitions, metal structures, and complex technical installations.

facades.title: Ventilated facades & curtain walls
facades.description: High thermal performance systems, modern appearance, long-term durability

partitions.title: Fire-rated partitions
partitions.description: Fire-resistant walls and doors compliant with Romanian and European standards

metalwork.title: Metal structures & fabrication
metalwork.description: Stairs, railings, gates, consoles, beams, and welded frames

roofing.title: Attics & technical roofing
roofing.description: Lightweight structures, certified waterproofing, complex sealing details

doors.title: Industrial metal gates
doors.description: Sectional, swing, sliding, with automation and access control

installation.title: Execution & installation
installation.description: In-house installation teams, technical supervision, on-site QA/QC

step1.title: Consultation & measurements
step1.description: Site visit, requirements analysis, precise technical measurements

step2.title: Design & quotation
step2.description: Execution details, structural calculations, transparent quote

step3.title: Workshop fabrication
step3.description: Rigorous quality control, schedule adherence, certified materials

step4.title: Installation & handover
step4.description: Experienced teams, coordination with other trades, complete documentation

whyUs.title: Why InterMax
whyUs.point1: Over 15 years of experience in residential, commercial, and industrial projects
whyUs.point2: In-house metal workshop and profile fabrication facility
whyUs.point4: Direct partnerships with European premium system manufacturers
whyUs.point5: Extended warranties and rapid post-installation service

q1.question: What type of construction projects do you handle?
q1.answer: We execute ventilated facades, fire-rated partitions, metal structures, attics, industrial gates, and other technical works for residential, commercial, and industrial buildings.

q2.question: Do you have your own workshop?
q2.answer: Yes, we have a modern workshop equipped with CNC machines for metal processing and custom component fabrication.

q3.question: Do you offer warranty?
q3.answer: All works are covered by warranty according to current legislation, and for certain systems we offer extended warranties through our partnerships.

q4.question: Do you work outside Bucharest?
q4.answer: Yes, we undertake projects throughout Romania and, selectively, in neighboring countries.

q5.question: How long does a typical project take?
q5.answer: Duration depends on complexity, but we provide detailed planning and clear timelines from the quotation phase.

ctaBand.title: Have a construction project in mind?
ctaBand.subtitle: Let's discuss your requirements and offer you an optimal technical solution.

hero.title: Advanced systems for defense and security
hero.subtitle: UAS platforms, perimeter surveillance solutions, C4ISR integration, and tactical consulting.

uas.title: Unmanned aerial systems (UAS)
uas.description: Multi-rotor and fixed-wing platforms for reconnaissance, surveillance, and special missions

isr.title: ISR & C4ISR
isr.description: Integrated intelligence, surveillance, reconnaissance, and command-control solutions

perimeter.title: Perimeter security
perimeter.description: Radar sensors, thermal cameras, intrusion detection systems, and alarm integration

training.title: Operator training
training.description: Theoretical and practical courses for UAS piloting, tactical procedures, and level I maintenance

maintenance.title: Technical support & maintenance
maintenance.description: Authorized service, spare parts, firmware upgrades, calibrations

consulting.title: Tactical consulting
consulting.description: Requirements analysis, system architecture design, integration with existing equipment

step1.title: Operational requirements analysis
step1.description: Client interview, scenario evaluation, definition of required capabilities

step2.title: Solution design
step2.description: Platform selection, payload configuration, communications architecture, C2 integration

step3.title: Delivery & installation
step3.description: Secure transport, initial configuration, functional checks, sensor calibration

step4.title: Training & continuous support
step4.description: Team training, operational documentation, reactive service, system upgrades

whyUs.title: Why InterMax
whyUs.point1: Direct partnerships with global UAS and security system manufacturers
whyUs.point2: Experience in projects for public institutions and private clients
whyUs.point3: Operator certifications and work authorizations in controlled spaces
whyUs.point4: Capability to integrate with existing IT/OT infrastructures
whyUs.point5: Local technical support and rapid service for critical platforms

q1.question: What types of drones do you provide?
q1.answer: We offer multi-rotor platforms for tactical surveillance, fixed-wing for wide-area reconnaissance, and hybrid solutions, depending on needs.

q2.question: Do you provide operator training?
q2.answer: Yes, our courses cover piloting, safety procedures, legislation, and basic maintenance.

q3.question: Can you integrate systems with our existing infrastructure?
q3.answer: Yes, we have experience in C4ISR integration, command center connectivity, and synchronization with other sensors.

q4.question: Do you offer post-sales support?
q4.answer: We offer maintenance packages, authorized service, spare parts, and technological upgrades throughout the system's lifecycle.

q5.question: Do you work with government institutions?
q5.answer: Yes, we have experience in projects for MoD, MoI, and other government agencies, complying with all procurement and security procedures.

ctaBand.title: Need a defense or security solution?
ctaBand.subtitle: Contact us for a technical evaluation and personalized quote.

hero.title: Precision agriculture through aerial technology
hero.subtitle: Multispectral mapping, crop monitoring, vegetation analysis, and data-driven agronomic consulting.

mapping.title: Mapping & orthophotos
mapping.description: High-resolution imagery, 3D terrain models, precise plot delineation

ndvi.title: Multispectral analysis (NDVI, NDRE)
ndvi.description: Early detection of plant stress, crop vigor assessment, problem zone mapping

irrigation.title: Irrigation monitoring
irrigation.description: Identify under/over-irrigated zones, optimize water consumption, periodic reports

scouting.title: Scouting & inspection
scouting.description: Disease detection, pests, emergence gaps, damage assessment, tree inventory

consulting.title: Agronomic consulting
consulting.description: Data interpretation, variable fertilization recommendations, intervention strategies

training.title: Training & know-how transfer
training.description: Internal team instruction, flight procedures, image processing, map interpretation

step1.title: Initial consultation
step1.description: Discuss objectives, assess area, establish flight frequency

step2.title: Flight & data acquisition
step2.description: Mission planning, RGB and multispectral image capture, AACR compliance

step3.title: Processing & analysis
step3.description: Orthophoto generation, vegetation index calculation, prescription map creation

step4.title: Reporting & action
step4.description: Deliver interactive reports, practical recommendations, implementation support

whyUs.title: Why InterMax
whyUs.point1: State-of-the-art multispectral sensors for precise detection
whyUs.point2: Professional software for agronomic processing and analysis
whyUs.point3: Collaboration with certified agronomists for data interpretation
whyUs.point4: Flexibility: on-demand flights or seasonal contracts
whyUs.point5: Clear, actionable reports adapted to client expertise level

q1.question: What areas can you cover?
q1.answer: From a few hectares to thousands of hectares, depending on platform and available time.

q2.question: How often should flights be conducted?
q2.answer: Depends on crop and objective: typically every 10-14 days for vegetation monitoring, or as needed for specific investigations.

q3.question: Do you also offer drone spraying/treatment services?
q3.answer: Currently we focus on mapping and analysis. For phytosanitary applications, we collaborate with specialized partners.

q4.question: What deliverables do I receive?
q4.answer: Georeferenced orthophotos, NDVI/NDRE maps, analysis reports, agronomic recommendations, and access to online visualization platform.

q5.question: Can I use the data for APIA applications?
q5.answer: Yes, our orthophotos can be used as supporting documentation, but verify specific requirements with your consultant.

ctaBand.title: Want to optimize agricultural production with aerial data?
ctaBand.subtitle: Request a demonstration on your land and see the difference.
